Proof of Humanity

To check your Proof of Humanity status, please connect your wallet.

Linea Proof of Humanity Providers

In order to complete PoH, your account must complete one (1) attestation from Group A and two (2) attestations from Group B.

GROUP A | Complete One Attestation

Gitcoin Passport

Verification conditions:

  • Passport Score must be strictly above 20
PADO Labs

Verification conditions:

  • Must have a valid attestation
  • Go to "Linea-Verax Voyage"
    Then "Proof of Humanity"
Trusta POH Attestation

Paused until further notice.

Verification conditions:

  • Must have a valid, non-revoked attestation
  • POH Score strictly above -2 and strictly below 60
  • Must be issued before 26.03.2024
Testnet Voyage NFT original recipient

Verification conditions:

  • Must be an original recipient of the Testnet Voyage NFT
  • Must be Tier 1 to 4
zkPass - Coinbase KYC

Verification conditions:

  • Must have a valid attestation
zkPass - OKX KYC

Verification conditions:

  • Must have a valid attestation
zkPass - Uber trips

Verification conditions:

  • Must have a valid attestation

GROUP B | Complete Two Attestations

Clique

Verification conditions:

  • Clique is not issuing attestation anymore.
  • If you already have a valid attestation, it will remain valid in the future.
Openid3

Verification conditions:

  • Must have a valid attestation
Nomis

Verification conditions:

  • Nomis Score must be equal or above 30
Orange Protocol

Verification conditions:

  • Must have a valid attestation
RubyScore

Paused until further notice.

Verification conditions:

  • Must have a valid, non-revoked attestation
  • Must be issued before 26.03.2024
Trusta Reputation Attestation

Paused until further notice.

Verification conditions:

  • Must have a valid, non-revoked attestation
  • Reputation Score strictly above 20 for Linea
  • Must be issued before 26.03.2024
0xScore

Verification conditions:

  • 0xScore Score must be strictly above 50

To learn more about Linea Voyage XP, Proof of Humanity, and Wallet Account Binding, read the FAQ here.

@2024 LINEA • A Consensys Formation

Scan to connect with one of our mobile apps

Coinbase Wallet app

Connect with your self-custody wallet

Coinbase app

Connect with your Coinbase account

  1. Open Coinbase Wallet app
  2. Tap Scan

Or try the Coinbase Wallet browser extension

  • Connect with dapps with just one click on your desktop browser
  • Add an additional layer of security by using a supported Ledger hardware wallet
